title: Kuopio, North Savo — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Kuopio, North Savo: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Kuopio is a city in North Savo with a population of 119,000. A lakeside city in the Finnish Lakeland, known for its market square, Kuopio Cathedral, and traditional fish pastries.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
